overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban downtown. The player crosses a wet street intersection and proceeds through increasingly narrow city streets and alleys with reflective pavement and scattered debris.

events.description: waiting at crosswalk then beginning to cross the street
turning slightly right while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then walking across the yellow-striped intersection

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing crossing the street from left to right
dark sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: illuminated blue street sign reading 'Brookland' mounted on metal pole
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with painted 'WALK' text
tall building facade with vertical pink neon advertisement
multi-story modern building with illuminated windows and balconies

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a neon-lit urban intersection at night. The player waits at a crosswalk beneath a 'Brookland' street sign, then proceeds to cross as vehicles pass by. A pedestrian crosses in the opposite direction while the wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights.

events.description: stepping onto sidewalk from the crosswalk
passing close to bright illuminated billboard creating strong local light

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a large glowing advertisement billboard

entered.detail: massive vertical billboard displaying a face with beverage can advertisement
large square concrete paving stones reflecting neon light

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the player walks along a concrete sidewalk dominated by a massive illuminated billboard featuring a face. The wet pavement continues to reflect the neon lights as the camera moves past the bright advertisement and street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian street with palm trees and benches

events.description: entering area with scattered papers and debris littering the ground
slight left turn while proceeding down the street

agents.ego_description: walking down a wide street lined with palm trees and neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench near palm tree planter

entered.detail: large circular concrete planters with palm trees
modern concrete seating arranged around the planters
row of shops with bright neon signage including pink and blue lights
trash and papers littering the wet reflective pavement

segments.scene_description: The player enters a wider pedestrian street lined with palm trees in concrete planters and benches. Scattered papers litter the wet ground while neon storefronts glow on the right side. A lone figure sits on a bench as the camera moves forward through the open space.

events.description: entering narrower street section with overhead building structures
navigating around pedestrians carrying umbrellas walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrower street passing pedestrians carrying umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with large umbrella walking toward camera
group of pedestrians walking away in the distance

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'TECHNOLOGIES' above storefront entrance
large red neon sign with asian characters on building wall
red and white striped barrier blocks near the corner

segments.scene_description: The space narrows as the player enters a commercial street with pedestrians carrying umbrellas. A 'TECHNOLOGIES' store sign and large red neon asian characters illuminate the walls. The player navigates through moderate foot traffic while concrete barricades line the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark narrow alley between tall buildings

events.description: entering darker alley with reduced ambient light and overhead coverage
slight right turn while proceeding through the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a dark narrow alleyway with tall buildings on both sides

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking away down the alley toward the lit tower

entered.detail: metal trash containers and cardboard boxes stacked against the wall
circular sign with paw print logo and purple neon border
enclosed bridge connecting buildings above the alley
tall illuminated tower visible at the end of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark narrow alley between towering buildings with an overhead walkway bridging the gap. Dumpsters and debris line the walls while a neon paw-print sign glows on the right. In the distance, a tall illuminated skyscraper is visible at the alley's end as the player continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling neon-lit intersection into a more open, atmospheric pedestrian plaza. It begins at a wet urban crosswalk beneath a Brookland street sign, moving forward as vehicles pass and the pavement reflects the vibrant city lights. As the camera crosses the street, the environment shifts toward a concrete sidewalk dominated by the overwhelming glow of a massive illuminated billboard featuring a face. The scene then expands into a wider pedestrian thoroughfare lined with palm trees in concrete planters and glowing storefronts, where scattered papers litter the ground. Finally, the camera glides past a lone figure sitting on a bench, moving deeper into the neon-drenched open space.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bustling, neon-lit commercial street into the oppressive confinement of a dark urban alley. It begins by navigating through a crowd of pedestrians with umbrellas, passing under the glow of a Technologies store sign and large red neon characters. As the player moves past concrete barricades, the open street abruptly shifts into a narrow corridor flanked by towering buildings and an overhead walkway. The scene then tightens further, passing dumpsters and a glowing neon paw-print sign while the surrounding light fades into deep shadows. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the debris-strewn path toward the distant, illuminated silhouette of a skyscraper at the alley's end.
